calendar.matters:
Petition For Declatory Relief And Construction Of Trust
Off Calendar Sep-07-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Benjamin Riley appeared via zoom for Chinese Hospital Association (petitioner).
Erika Yuen and Alicia Gamez appeared in person for Stella Chan Dijamco (trustee).
James Cummins appeared via zoom for the (objectors/beneficiaries).

Disccusion was held regarding the issue of venue, that case should be heard in San Mateo County, that San Mateo County has two other petitions currently pending, and that parties to work together to put an order tighter and submit to the Court at the end of business on September 06, 2023. Petition for declaratory relief etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Yang. Not reported.
